description: Designpowers shared core registry — the single source of truth every runner loads. Runners contain no design logic; they read this manifest to discover agents, their contracts/personas, the evidence schema they must emit, and the MCP truth-layer servers they need. All paths are relative to the repository root.

designpowers-accessibility.description: WCAG 2.2 colour-contrast truth layer. Returns measured ratios and AA/AAA pass/fail — evidence, not estimates.

accessibility-critic.description: Reviews design output for inclusive design, backing every contrast claim with measured evidence from the WCAG MCP tool.

model_hints.why: Vision lets the critic read colours off a screenshot to propose pairs to check; large context lets it ingest a whole DESIGN.md palette at once. Both only PROPOSE what to measure — the MCP tool supplies the truth.
